original_image_tags: Aged, slightly discolored paper document, likely a routing slip or cover sheet, with horizontal fold lines. The page is mostly blank but contains several blue ink stamps indicating receipt by various U.S. Department of Justice and FBI offices. Two dark circular holes are punched at the top center. Brown tape remnants are visible on the left and right edges.

elements.description: Multiple blue stamped annotations and two pieces of brown adhesive tape on a mostly blank, off-white paper page with two hole-punches at the top. The stamps include text such as 'RECEIVED - NICHOLS', 'F.B.I.', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', and various dates and times from July 1952.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements: off-white/aged paper, horizontal fold lines, mostly blank page, two hole-punches at top center, brown tape remnants, and multiple blue ink stamps from DOJ and FBI offices with specific dates and times.
